title: EMERGENCY PERSONAL SERVICES - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION COOS BAY EMERGENCY PERSONAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides furniture, clothing, and clothing vouchers to individuals in urgent situations (fire, flood, etc.). 1155 Flanagan Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Individuals and households with urgent needs Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 9am-11am (541) 888-5202 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 888-5202 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Accepts referrals from other organizations that can attest to the client's need (a physician, ODHS, etc.). FEES: None DOCUMENTS: In some cases, a letter from another organization that documents the need may be required. Call for more information. AREA SERVED: Coos County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Empire District of Coos Bay Services: Clothing Vouchers Furniture General Clothing Provision Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOPE MARKET If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION COOS BAY
